Find the closing line of YAML front matter

Source: R/render.R
find_front_matter_end.Rd

Looks for a document that starts with --- and returns the line number of the matching closing ---. Returns 0 if no front matter is found.

Usage

find_front_matter_end(lines)

Arguments

lines

Character vector of file lines.

Value

Integer line number of the closing ---, or 0.

On this page
